productDisplayName: Clarks Men Aston Mind Black Formal Shoe
description: Richly hued penny loafers from clarks with straps at the bridge, seams on the toe cap and a refined stacked heel. Crafted with Italian leather and fashioned to add panache to any dressy ensemble. Wear this with chinos and a polo t-shirt or a suit. Upper Leather upper with slip on styling and reinforced overlay at the heel collar A leather strap across the midfoot with a triangular cutout at the lateral side Seams at the toe box Padded leather lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Multi-directional lugs on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
